form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== supplierId[供应商] materialId[物料] uoMId[计量单位] currencyId[币种] =========>price[价格信息]====== unitPrice[单价] taxRate[税率(%)] minOrderQuantity[最小订量] leadTimeDays[交货周期(天)] priority[优先级] =========>validity[有效期]====== validFrom[生效日] validTo[失效日] isActive[是否启用] =========^audit[审计信息]========= createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== supplierId[供应商] materialId[物料] uoMId[计量单位] currencyId[币种] =========>price[价格信息]====== unitPrice[单价] taxRate[税率(%)] minOrderQuantity[最小订量] leadTimeDays[交货周期(天)] priority[优先级] =========>validity[有效期]====== validFrom[生效日] validTo[失效日] isActive[是否启用]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: supplierId[供应商] materialId[物料] currencyId[币种] isActive[是否启用] validFrom[生效日]
